component.name: VoiceFlow
component.summary: Offline voice dictation for Linux and Windows, using Whisper

description.p: VoiceFlow is an open-source voice-to-text dictation app for Linux and Windows. Hold a global hotkey to record, release and the transcript is pasted at the cursor. It uses OpenAI Whisper through faster-whisper, running on your own machine. Free, no account needed.

ul.li: Push-to-talk global hotkey, including modifier-only combos
Automatic paste at cursor on release
Wayland and X11 support on Linux
CUDA GPU acceleration with automatic CPU fallback
